summary: Testing iteration 18: Verified 3 bug fixes/features - 1) Inactive customers total_spent now calculated from bills (not cached), 2) Salespeople page shows branch name or 'No branch', 3) New salesperson performance page with charts and summary cards
passed_tests: Bug Fix: GET /api/analytics/customers/inactive returns total_spent calculated from approved/sent/edited bills
Bug Fix: Inactive customers total_spent matches sum of approved bills (verified: Test Customer ₹56,753)
UI Fix: Salespeople list shows 'No branch' text for salespeople without branch assignment
UI Fix: Salespeople add form includes branch select dropdown
UI Fix: Salespeople list has 'All Branches' filter dropdown
Navigation: Clicking salesperson row navigates to /admin/salespeople/:spName
New Feature: /api/salespeople/:spName/performance endpoint returns correct structure
New Feature: Performance endpoint returns name, branch_name, total_sales, total_bills, daily_sales
New Feature: Performance page shows 4 summary cards (Total Sales, Total Bills, Avg Daily, Performance Trend)
New Feature: Performance page shows Day-wise Sales Breakdown table
New Feature: Performance page shows 'No sales data available' when no bills exist
New Feature: Back button navigates to /admin/salespeople
Auth: Performance endpoint requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line ~1457: get_inactive_customers correctly calculates total_spent from bills with status in ['sent','approved','edited'] instead of using cached customer.total_spent
server.py line ~1828: get_salesperson_performance endpoint correctly aggregates bills by salesperson_name
SalespeopleManagement.js: Row click handler correctly encodes name in URL with encodeURIComponent()
SalespersonPerformance.js: Charts only render when daily_sales has data, preventing empty chart display

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified working: 1) Inactive customers bug fix - total_spent calculated from approved/sent/edited bills (Test Customer has ₹56,753 from 1 sent bill), 2) Salespeople branch display - shows 'No branch' for Rahul and Priya since they have no branch_id, 3) Salesperson performance page shows empty state with ₹0 values and 'No sales data' message because no bills have salesperson_name set

inactive_customers_bug_fix.note: total_spent now calculated from bills, not cached customer.total_spent

salespeople_branch_display.branch_display: 'No branch' shown in gray italic text for salespeople without branch_id
salespeople_branch_display.note: Rahul and Priya show 'No branch' as expected

salesperson_performance_page.charts: AreaChart and BarChart (hidden when no data)
salesperson_performance_page.table: Day-wise Sales Breakdown with 'No sales data available' empty state
salesperson_performance_page.note: Shows empty/zero state because no bills have salesperson_name='Rahul' set

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown on admin dashboard instead of actual delivery
